title: Dune: Part Two
description: Paul Atreides unites with the Fremen to wage war against those who destroyed his family.

title: Oppenheimer
description: The story of physicist J. Robert Oppenheimer and the creation of the atomic bomb.

title: The Batman
description: Batman investigates corruption in Gotham while pursuing a mysterious serial killer.

title: Top Gun: Maverick
description: Maverick returns to train a new generation of elite Navy pilots.

title: Avatar: The Way of Water
description: Jake Sully and his family face new threats on Pandora.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
description: A woman discovers she must connect with alternate versions of herself to save reality.

title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
description: Miles Morales journeys across the multiverse and meets new Spider heroes.

title: John Wick: Chapter 4
description: John Wick battles powerful enemies in his quest for freedom.

title: Fallout
description: Survivors emerge from underground vaults into a post-apocalyptic wasteland.

title: The Last of Us
description: A hardened survivor escorts a young girl across a dangerous post-pandemic America.

title: Severance
description: Employees undergo a procedure that separates work memories from personal life.

title: House of the Dragon
description: The Targaryen dynasty faces a brutal civil war generations before Game of Thrones.

title: The Bear
description: A talented chef returns home to run his family's struggling restaurant.

title: Andor
description: Cassian Andor becomes involved in the growing rebellion against the Empire.

title: Shōgun
description: Political intrigue and warfare unfold in feudal Japan after a foreign sailor arrives.
Jack Bauer faces a series of terrorist attacks in Los Angeles.
